things.name: Giant Panda Breeding Research Base
things.description: Home to 100+ giant pandas — arrive early morning to see the cubs at their most active during feeding

things.name: Jiuzhaigou Valley
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage turquoise lakes and waterfalls in a spectacular mountain valley — 9 hours north

things.name: Jinli Ancient Street
things.description: Reconstructed Han Dynasty street with tea houses, street food, local handicrafts and Sichuan opera masks

things.name: Leshan Giant Buddha Day Trip
things.description: The world's largest stone Buddha (71 m) carved from a cliff face — river boat provides the best view

things.name: Sichuan Opera at Shufeng Yayun
things.description: Evening performance of face-changing, fire-breathing and puppet shows — a uniquely Chengdu experience

things.name: Wuhou Shrine & Museum
things.description: Dedicated to Zhuge Liang and Liu Bei of Three Kingdoms fame — beautiful gardens and a Han Dynasty tomb

things.name: Du Fu Thatched Cottage
things.description: Reconstruction of the Tang Dynasty poet's cottage — tranquil gardens beloved by Chinese literary scholars

things.name: Hot Pot Dinner
things.description: Sichuan hot pot is one of China's great culinary experiences — numbingly spicy broth for dipping anything

things.name: Sanxingdui Museum
things.description: Extraordinary 3,000-year-old bronze masks and figures from a previously unknown ancient civilisation

things.name: Qingcheng Mountain Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Taoist mountain with 36 peaks, ancient temples and misty cable-car rides
